input.headline: NASA unveils close-up pictures of the comet popping by from another star

raw.headline: NASA unveils close-up pictures of the comet popping by from another star

winner: NASA's latest photos of the interstellar comet reveal a surprisingly ordinary sight: a comet, sitting at a desk, filling out its tax forms.

candidates.text: NASA's latest photos of the interstellar comet reveal a surprisingly ordinary sight: a comet, sitting at a desk, filling out its tax forms.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific, with a clever twist on the comet's mundane activity."}

candidates.text: Why did the comet bring a telescope? Because it heard NASA prefers close-ups!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative but lacks strong surprise and specificity; the connection between the comet bringing a telescope and NASA's preference for close-ups feels weak and a bit forced."}

candidates.text: Why did the comet bring a selfie stick? To get closer shots when it popped by!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks surprise and specificity; 'selfie stick' feels generic and not tightly connected to the comet's action."}

candidates.text: Comets are like long-lost astronauts... they fly by Earth, say "hey," and then never call back again.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and uses a metaphor, but it's generic and not strongly tied to the specific context of NASA unveiling comet pictures. It lacks surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the comet visit Earth for a playdate? To catch up on some interstellar gossip!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'playdate' and 'interstellar gossip,' but it lacks specificity to the comet's context in the headline and feels a bit generic."}
